rules.h1: font-heading text-4xl sm:text-5xl lg:text-6xl font-bold tracking-tight text-primary
rules.h2: font-heading text-2xl sm:text-3xl lg:text-4xl font-semibold text-primary
rules.label: font-body text-sm font-semibold tracking-wide uppercase text-primary/80

logo.usage: Global header, Admin sidebar top, and anywhere brand identity is required. Keep size constrained (e.g., h-12 w-auto).

hero_background.styling:
Absolute positioned, object-cover. CRITICAL: Add overlay `
` to ensure text readability (White and Gold text on top). Do not let the image overpower the UI.

admin_login_background.styling: Use as full viewport background. Apply heavy blur and overlay: `bg-primary/90 backdrop-blur-md` so the login card pops. The image should feel like a subtle texture rather than a sharp photo.

buttons.primary: bg-primary text-primary-foreground hover:bg-primary/90 px-8 py-3 rounded-full font-body font-semibold transition-all shadow-md hover:shadow-lg
buttons.secondary: bg-transparent border-2 border-secondary text-secondary hover:bg-secondary hover:text-white px-8 py-3 rounded-full font-body font-semibold transition-all
buttons.submit: bg-secondary text-white hover:bg-[#b89423] px-10 py-4 rounded-full font-body font-bold text-lg shadow-lg hover:shadow-xl transition-all w-full md:w-auto

cards.default: bg-white border border-border rounded-xl shadow-[0_4px_20px_rgba(15,37,87,0.05)] p-6 md:p-8
cards.dashboard_widget: bg-white border border-border rounded-xl shadow-sm hover:shadow-md transition-shadow p-6

feedback_wizard.layout: Max-width 3xl container, centered. Use generous spacing (gap-8, p-8).

step_indicator.line: absolute top-1/2 left-0 w-full h-[2px] bg-border -z-10 -translate-y-1/2
step_indicator.active_line: absolute top-1/2 left-0 h-[2px] bg-secondary -z-10 -translate-y-1/2 transition-all duration-300
step_indicator.step_circle: w-10 h-10 rounded-full flex items-center justify-center font-bold text-sm bg-white border-2 transition-colors

star_rating.star_icon: w-8 h-8 md:w-10 md:h-10 cursor-pointer transition-transform hover:scale-110
star_rating.label: text-lg font-heading text-primary mt-2

admin_dashboard.layout: Flex layout. Left sidebar (w-64, bg-primary, text-white), Right content area (flex-1, bg-background, p-8).
admin_dashboard.sidebar_nav_link: flex items-center gap-3 px-4 py-3 rounded-lg text-white/70 hover:text-white hover:bg-white/10 transition-colors
admin_dashboard.kpi_grid: grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-4 gap-6 mb-8
admin_dashboard.table_container: bg-white border border-border rounded-xl overflow-hidden shadow-sm

layout.spacing: Generous whitespace. Use p-8, p-12 for sections. Tailwind gaps gap-6 or gap-8.
layout.alignment: Left-align forms and dense content. Center hero headings.
layout.dividers: Use subtle gold hairline dividers (`border-t border-border`) to separate sections.

micro_animations.entrance: Use framer-motion for simple fade-in and slide-up (y: 20, opacity: 0 -> y: 0, opacity: 1) on form steps.
micro_animations.stagger: Stagger list items in dashboard by 0.1s.

rules: All interactive elements MUST have a `data-testid` attribute.

instructions_to_main_agent: Strictly adhere to the CSS variables defined in 'theme.colors.css_vars'. Add these to the :root in global CSS.
Import 'Playfair Display' and 'Manrope' via Google Fonts and configure them in tailwind.config.js as `font-heading` and `font-body`.
Do NOT use pure white (#FFFFFF) for page backgrounds, use the warm off-white mapped to the background CSS variable.
For the Feedback Wizard, maintain a clean, distraction-free UI. The cards must have subtle shadows and gold borders.
Use Shadcn UI components for dropdowns/selects but customize them to match the East West branding (roundness, border colors).
Admin Dashboard MUST use Recharts. Use the provided 'charts' color palette for data visualization.
NEVER use placeholder images. ONLY use the 3 provided URLs exactly as instructed.
Implement the Star Rating component with SVG stars, applying the 'star_filled' and 'star_empty' classes based on state.
Ensure the hero background image is properly heavily overlaid with navy to maintain AA contrast ratios for the text.
